metadata.description: Kiingo plugin marketplace for Vistage Chair and peer advisory group workflows.

plugins.name: vistage-chair-toolkit
plugins.description: The complete toolkit for peer advisory group facilitators: meeting design, issue processing, exercises, curriculum strategy, one-to-one coaching, onboarding, guest days, accountability, group composition, market mapping, authority building, referrals, public trigger monitoring, stalled prospect revival, prospect signals, prospect research, outreach, objections, recruitment strategy, and sales coaching. Built for Vistage Chairs, EO moderators, YPO forum officers, and anyone who runs CEO peer groups.
